improvements.proposed_prompt_text: For integration tests that verify blob output, require evidence that the observed blob was created/updated by the current invocation (for example, compare blob last_modified or ETag against invocation start state).
When blob names are date-based, account for UTC midnight rollover by polling both pre-invocation and post-invocation date candidates.
If acceptance criteria specify an exact storage container/path, assert it explicitly in the test rather than relying on environment overrides.
